nasb.text: Therefore there was born even of one man, and him as good as dead at that, as many descendants  as the stars of heaven in number, and innumerable as the sand which is by the seashore.

esv.text: Therefore from one man, and him as good as dead, were born descendants as many as the stars of heaven and as many as the innumerable grains of sand by the seashore.

cnv.text: 所以從一個好像已死的人，竟然生出許多子孫來，仿佛天上的星那麼眾多，海邊的沙那麼無數。

ccb.text: 所以，从一个垂暮之年的人生出许多子孙，好像天上的星、海边的沙那么多。

csbs.text: 所以从一个如同已经死了的人，就生出了许多人，像天空的星那样众多，像海边的沙那样无法数算。
